notes: JPS: And they that fall away are gone deep in making slaughter; and I am rejected of them all.
JPS: Their doings will not suffer them to return unto their God; for the spirit of harlotry is within them, and they know not the LORD.

Israel ought to have begotten children of God in the maintenance of the covenant with the Lord; but in its apostasy from God it had begotten an adulterous generation, children whom the Lord could not acknowledge as His own (Keil and Delitzsch, Commentary, 10:1:89).
trumpet (Heb. chatsotserah) from chatsar "to sound a trumpet"
Ramah =" hill" a place of battle between Israel and Syria

quotes.text: The Prophet Joseph quoted from Hosea 6 to show that the second coming of Christ would not be before the 1890s. (Teachings, p. 286.) Unfortunately, his reasoning was not recorded and the relevance of his statement is now past.
quotes.speaker: Monte S. Nyman
quotes.attr: Monte S. Nyman, "Restoring 'Plain and Precious Parts': The Role of Latter-day Scriptures in Helping Us Understand the Bible," Ensign, Dec. 1981, 24
